snippet.title: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World - First Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Hiccup and Toothless finally discover their true destinies: the village chief and the leader of the dragons. But looming on the horizon is the darkest threat they've yet faced.

Watch more trailers here!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OgfYuUCBSNI&list=PLraFbwCoisJAvwhU-EjfZNFqj5jlAk8hk

Subscribe to IGN for more!
http://www.youtube.com/user/IGNentertainment?sub_confirmation=1
